notes: Works out of the box. No issues encountered.
title: Stationeers

notes: Constructed most things. And barring known bugs on the beta branch. Everything just worked. The only issues encountered were game related and not proton.
title: Stationeers

notes: runs perfectly without any tweaks, however one would expect higher performance from the game, it is unknown to me if this is proton related though.
title: Stationeers

notes: Mouse clicks and scroll wheel make the camera spin around ~1/4 turn per click making it impossible to interact with objects. Rebinding "use left/right hand" to other keys (like z/x) gets around that, but you still have to scroll to change blueprints as far as I know. On Proton 4.2-9 the mouse will occasionally screw up and not be properly captured by the game and will cause you to go spinning even at the slightest movement (more rapidly the further your mouse is from center) but 4.11-5 doesn't seem to have this issue. Both have the spinning when clicking/scrolling however. Otherwise, game runs as good as on Windows. It was Platinum before the latest update which I think changed versions of Unity. Right now it perfectly fits the Bronze description "has issues preventing from playing comfortably" as it definitely runs well except for the discomfort of spinning when you use the scroll wheel or have to rebind mouse clicks to keyboard keys.
title: Stationeers

notes: The game is unplayable due to the latest update in which the devs switched from some outdated version of the unity engine to one which was reported to occassionally break the mouse controls on certain titles. The mouse controls are utterly f*cked and hence make the game crucially unplayable. The game did occassionally corrupt saves and experience bugs more so than windows, however it still performs as well as on windows, which is honestly very poor. Concluding, the latest update made the game completely unplayable, buggy and poorly performing.
title: Stationeers

notes: The last update have bugged the mouse when using in fullscreen, instead use windowed. Also to run smooth use 'PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 %command%', it will help A LOT!
title: Stationeers

notes: Latest Unity engine does not play well with Linux. Mouse capture has serious issues. You will have to figure workarounds like using windowed mode(still wonky) or changing primary action buttons to keyboard buttons(even then it will still jump when you scroll and scrolling is needed for the menus and other things because of poor control design.)
title: Stationeers
